title: Merge table point to wrong columns if columns in partition tables are deleted
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_partition_table (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_partition_table VALUES (1, 'Alice', now()), (2, 'Bob', now());
ALTER TABLE test_partition_table ADD COLUMN age Int32;
UPDATE test_partition_table SET age = 30 WHERE id = 1;
ALTER TABLE test_partition_table DROP COLUMN name;
key_bug_features: Deleting columns in partition tables causes merge errors
